source_intake_record.raw_question_text:

Question: Determine the duty cycle of this square wave signal, as shown in the figure. The duty cycle is ______%.

multi_step: solving likely requires extracting at least two visual quantities from the waveform (e.g., high time and period)
duty cycle then requires a computation or ratio-to-percent conversion
answer_type is numeric and there are no choices, so the result is likely produced rather than selected
question itself is short, so the reasoning depth appears moderate rather than high
